nasb.text: So he returned to Judah, and said, “I did not find her; and furthermore, the men of the place said, ‘There has been no temple prostitute here.’ ”

esv.text: So he returned to Judah and said, “I have not found her. Also, the men of the place said, ‘No cult prostitute has been here.’”

cnv.text: 那人回去見猶大，說：“我找不著她，並且那地的人都說：‘這裡是沒有妓女的。’”

ccb.text: 他的朋友只好回去对犹大说：“我找不着她，当地人说那里没有庙妓。”

csbs.text: 他回到犹大那里，说：“我找不到她，那地方的人还说：‘这里从来没有庙妓。’”
